query:
SELECT id, title, slot, dateLabel, linkedinUrl FROM linkedin_posts WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE '%vibe%' ORDER BY dateLabel DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT id, section, title, dateLabel FROM daily_editorial WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE '%vibe%' ORDER BY dateLabel DESC LIMIT 10;
